memoryArtifacts.headline: Early New England Families, 1641-1700, Vol Alexander Adams (m. 1644), John Stone, pg 1
memoryArtifacts.description:
Early New England Families, 1641-1700. (Original Online Database: AmericanAncestors.org, New England Historic Genealogical Society, 2013. (By Alicia Crane Williams, Lead Genealogist.)

https://www.americanancestors.org/DB501/i/32105/1/800243073

Isaac Stearns (1595 – June 19, 1671[1]) was an English emigrant who, on April 8, 1630, embarked from Yarmouth, England, aboard the ship Arbella.[2] He was among the original settlers of the Massachusetts Bay Colony.[3]  From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isaac Stearns於1597年出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德時，他的父親Thomas Sterne42歲，母親Dorothy Plampin38歲。他於1622年5月20日與Mary Barker在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1671年6月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年74歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isaac Stearns于1597年出生在英国素福爾可納易藍德时，他的父亲Thomas Sterne42岁，母亲Dorothy Plampin38岁。他于1622年5月20日与Mary Barker在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1671年6月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年74岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Stearns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Stearn , with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Stern ).
History: In 1646 Charles Stearns was admitted as a freeman of Watertown, MA.

variants.name: Stearn
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire and Suffolk): variant of   Stern  .

nameMeanings.name: Isaac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Isaac Stearns was born in 1597, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Sterne, was 42 and his mother, Dorothy Plampin, was 38. He married Mary Barker on 20 May 1622, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 19 June 1671, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isaac Stearns est né en 1597, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Sterne, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Plampin, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mary Barker le 20 mai 1622, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1671, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Stearns è nato il nel 1597 nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Sterne, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Plampin, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Mary Barker il 20 maggio 1622, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 19 giugno 1671, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Isaac Stearnsが1597年にイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Sterneは42歳，母Dorothy Plampinは38歳であった。1622年5月20日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでMary Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1671年6月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで74歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Isaac Stearns(이)가 1597년 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Sterne(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Plampin(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1622년 5월 20일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Mary Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1671년 6월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Stearns nasceu em 1597, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Sterne, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Plampin, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Barker em 20 de maio de 1622, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1671, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isaac Stearns родился в 1597 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Sterne было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Plampin, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Barker 20 мая 1622 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 19 июня 1671 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isaac Stearns nació en 1597, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Sterne, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Dorothy Plampin, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Mary Barker el 20 de mayo de 1622, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1671, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
